requiredPhrases.condition: when channel is 'social' and store_state is a recreational-only state

prohibitions: Do not make any medical or health claims about cannabis products.
Do not claim any product cures, treats, prevents, or diagnoses any condition.
Do not use the word 'anxiety' — use 'relaxation' or 'stress relief' instead.
Do not reference minors, children, teens, or youth in any context.
Do not guarantee any outcome or effect.
Do not invent potency numbers, lab data, or clinical evidence not present in the input.
Do not use the word 'medical' or 'medicinal' to describe any product or effect.
Do not compare to competitor products by name.
Do not include price or promotional language in product descriptions.
